home.headline: Explore the Faroe Islands by car
home.conceptTitle: Explore the Faroe Islands your way
home.conceptP1: FaroeRent connects travellers with local car owners across the islands. Instead of relying on expensive traditional rental companies, you can rent a car directly from locals and explore the islands at your own pace.
home.conceptP2: Whether you want to drive along dramatic coastal roads, visit hidden villages, or chase waterfalls and mountains, having your own car gives you the freedom to experience the Faroe Islands properly.
home.conceptLocalText: Rent directly from locals across the islands.
home.conceptAirportText: Many cars can be picked up directly at the airport.
home.conceptPricesText: Often cheaper than traditional rental companies.

rent.title: Rent a Car
rent.description: Find and book a car from local owners across the Faroe Islands.
rent.heroHeadline: Rent a car from locals across the Faroe Islands
rent.noCarsMatch: No cars match your search. Try different dates or filters.
rent.policyInsuranceNote: Bookings are subject to the owner's insurance terms. Always verify coverage before driving.
rent.policyDriverRequirements: Drivers must hold a valid driving licence and follow local traffic laws.
rent.availabilitySummary: Bookable from {notice} day(s) in advance, up to {window} day(s) ahead.
rent.bookingNeedsDates: Select pickup and dropoff dates first.
rent.bookingRequested: Booking requested. You can see it in your bookings.
rent.bookingRequestSent: Booking request sent. The owner will respond shortly.
rent.bookingError: Could not create booking. Please try again.

list.title: List Your Car
list.description: Share your car with tourists and locals. Earn extra income when your car is not in use.
list.heroTitle: Earn money by renting out your car
list.heroSubtitle: List your car on FaroeRent and earn money when you're not using it. Tourists across the Faroe Islands are looking for cars every day.
list.heroTrust3: Full control of price and availability
list.howStep1Text: Add photos and basic information about your vehicle.
list.howStep2Text: Travelers request your car for their trip.
list.howStep3Text: Receive payment after each completed rental.
list.whyTitle: Why list your car on FaroeRent
list.whyCard1Text: Tourists are looking for cars on the islands every day.
list.whyCard2Text: Set your price, availability, and who can book.
list.whyCard3Text: Verified renters and clear rental terms.
list.uploadHint: Drag photos here or click to upload
list.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe your car, its condition, and any special features...
list.wizardAvailabilityHint: Block dates when your car is not available.
list.wizardConfirmInsurance: I confirm that the car has valid insurance
list.wizardConfirmAllowed: I confirm that I am allowed to rent out this vehicle
list.wizardConfirmCorrect: I confirm that the information provided is correct
list.publishSuccessTitle: Your car has been listed successfully
list.publishSuccessMessage: Your listing is now visible on the Rent a Car page.
